assignments.name: user_query
assignments.value: Can this workflow create a transaction, normalize a query, check Qdrant, and record a retrieval decision?

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_transactions (
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_name }}',
  'active_call',
  'created',
  'not_started',
  'not_started',
  '{{ $json.user_query }}'
)
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  created_at,
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'workflow.started',
  'Manual Trigger',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'workflow', 'RAG Active Call - Phase 1A-1B',
    'route_type', '{{ $json.route_type }}',
    'user_query', '{{ $json.user_query }}'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET normalized_query = '{{ $json.normalized_query }}'
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}';

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'query.normalized',
  'Normalize Query',
  'completed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'normalized_query', '{{ $json.normalized_query }}'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id;

INSERT INTO rag_trace_events (
  transaction_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
  'retrieval.collection_check',
  'Check Qdrant Collection',
  'decision',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'qdrant_collection', '{{ $json.qdrant_collection }}',
    'qdrant_status_code', {{ $json.qdrant_status_code || 0 }},
    'collection_exists', {{ $json.collection_exists }},
    'retrieval_decision', '{{ $json.retrieval_decision }}'
  )
)
RETURNING event_id, transaction_id;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.next_status }}',
  retrieval_status = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.next_retrieval_status }}',
  response_status = 'not_posted',
  refusal_reason = NULLIF('{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.refusal_reason }}', ''),
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Retrieval Decision")[0].json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms;

SELECT
  event_id,
  event_name,
  node_name,
  status,
  event_payload,
  created_at
FROM rag_trace_events
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;
